title: polypodium bongoense
intro: Polypodium bongoense, also known as the Bongo fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in African folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Polypodium bongoense include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating pain, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and rhizomes of the plant are often extracted in water or alcohol to create teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
